---
title: ""
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}

# Interactive Calculus I

### Learn Calculus by Exploring, Experimenting, and Discovering

This website combines interactive visualizations, simulations, and guided investigations to help you develop intuition before learning formulas.

:::

## Welcome

Calculus is the mathematics of **change**.

Rather than memorizing procedures, this course emphasizes:

- Visual understanding
- Interactive exploration
- Real-world applications
- Conceptual reasoning
- Mathematical communication

Many lessons include interactive **marimo notebooks** that allow you to manipulate parameters and observe how mathematical ideas emerge.

## Course Modules

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

<div class="lesson-card">

## 📈 Limits

Explore the fundamental idea of a limit.

- Average vs. instantaneous change
- Numerical exploration
- Graphical intuition
- Interactive visualizations

[Open Module →](limits.qmd)

</div>

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

<div class="lesson-card">

## 🎢 Derivatives

Discover derivatives through motion and change.

- Speed and velocity
- Tangent lines
- Roller coaster exploration
- Instantaneous rates of change

[Open Module →](derivatives.qmd)

</div>

:::

::::

## Coming Soon

<div class="coming-soon">

- Chain Rule
- Product Rule
- Quotient Rule
- Implicit Differentiation
- Applications of Derivatives
- Optimization
- Related Rates

</div>

## About This Project

This project was developed using:

- Quarto
- Python
- marimo

with the goal of creating an open and interactive learning environment for Calculus I students.
